title: Note to my representatives
content: I strongly support your cause for rally against the amnesty bill. I went to join the rally at Samsen station, Silom and will drop by Rajdumnern as well. However, I would like to ask you to make sure that Democrat does not deviate from this course no matter how much pressure other groups or rally attendants might have put on you. Many groups might have their difference agendas. But our agenda is to set thing right not to topple the government.
